questionText: Você está em uma farmácia e quer saber se o medicamento que está com febre será suficiente. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: Could you recommend something for my high fever?
options: Could you recommend something for my high fever?

questionText: Um colega está se queixando de dor de cabeça. Como você demonstra empatia?
correctAnswer: That sounds really painful. Have you taken anything for it?
options: That sounds really painful. Have you taken anything for it?

questionText: Você precisa chamar uma ambulância em uma emergência. Qual é a maneira correta de comunicar?
correctAnswer: I need an ambulance immediately. My friend is having chest pain.
options: I need an ambulance immediately. My friend is having chest pain.

questionText: Como você polida e gentilmente nega um convite porque não está se sentindo bem?
correctAnswer: Thank you for the invitation, but I'm not feeling well today.
options: Thank you for the invitation, but I'm not feeling well today.
No, I don't want to go

questionText: Um amigo pergunta sobre seu estado de saúde. Como você responde de forma detalhada?
correctAnswer: I've been having trouble sleeping and my back hurts lately.
options: I've been having trouble sleeping and my back hurts lately.

questionText: Você está no consultório do médico e quer descrever seus sintomas. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: I've been feeling dizzy and tired for the past three days.
options: I've been feeling dizzy and tired for the past three days.

questionText: Como você faz uma sugestão de saúde a um amigo de forma delicada?
correctAnswer: You might want to consider getting more exercise. It could help you feel better.
options: You might want to consider getting more exercise. It could help you feel better.

questionText: Você quer agendar uma consulta com o dentista. Como você faz isso?
correctAnswer: I'd like to make an appointment with the dentist. Do you have any available slots next week?
options: I'd like to make an appointment with the dentist. Do you have any available slots next week?

questionText: Um colega faltou ao trabalho e você quer saber se está tudo bem. Qual mensagem é apropriada?
correctAnswer: I heard you weren't feeling well. Is there anything I can do to help?
options: I heard you weren't feeling well. Is there anything I can do to help?

questionText: Como você pede informações sobre os efeitos colaterais de um medicamento?
correctAnswer: Are there any side effects I should be aware of with this medication?
options: Are there any side effects I should be aware of with this medication?

questionText: Você está em uma aula de fitness e quer dizer ao instrutor que tem uma lesão. Como você comunica?
correctAnswer: I have a shoulder injury, so I might need to modify some exercises.
options: I have a shoulder injury, so I might need to modify some exercises.

questionText: Como você expressa preocupação com a saúde de um familiar durante uma conversa?
correctAnswer: I'm really worried about Dad's health. He's been coughing a lot lately.
options: I'm really worried about Dad's health. He's been coughing a lot lately.

questionText: Você quer recomendar um estilo de vida mais saudável a um amigo. Como você faz isso construtivamente?
correctAnswer: Maybe we could start going to the gym together. It would be great for both of us.
options: Maybe we could start going to the gym together. It would be great for both of us.

questionText: No hospital, como você pergunta ao enfermeiro sobre o horário de visitas?
correctAnswer: What are the visiting hours? I'd like to see my friend later today.
options: What are the visiting hours? I'd like to see my friend later today.

questionText: Como você pede ao seu médico para explicar um diagnóstico de forma mais simples?
correctAnswer: Could you explain that in simpler terms? I'm not sure I understand what you mean.
options: Could you explain that in simpler terms? I'm not sure I understand what you mean.

questionText: Você quer encorajar um amigo a parar de fumar. Qual abordagem é mais eficaz?
correctAnswer: I believe in you. Quitting would be really good for your health and I'd be happy to support you.
options: I believe in you. Quitting would be really good for your health and I'd be happy to support you.

questionText: Durante uma consulta online, o médico pergunta sobre seus hábitos alimentares. Como você responde detalhadamente?
correctAnswer: I try to eat balanced meals, but I struggle with late-night snacking and don't drink enough water.
options: I try to eat balanced meals, but I struggle with late-night snacking and don't drink enough water.

questionText: Um colega de trabalho está sofrendo de estresse. Como você sugere ajuda de forma profissional?
correctAnswer: You seem stressed. Have you thought about talking to a counselor? It might really help.
options: You seem stressed. Have you thought about talking to a counselor? It might really help.

questionText: Você precisa informar seu supervisor que precisará de alguns dias de licença para tratar de um problema de saúde. Como você comunica?
correctAnswer: I need to take a few days off for a health-related matter. Would that be possible next week?
options: I need to take a few days off for a health-related matter. Would that be possible next week?

questionText: Como você educadamente declina uma bebida alcoólica em um evento social por razões de saúde?
correctAnswer: No thanks, I'm trying to cut back on alcohol for my health. I'll have a water instead.
options: No thanks, I'm trying to cut back on alcohol for my health. I'll have a water instead.

questionText: Você deseja compartilhar um sucesso pessoal relacionado à saúde. Como você o faz de forma apropriada?
correctAnswer: I'm really proud of myself. I've finally managed to stick with my diet and exercise routine.
options: I'm really proud of myself. I've finally managed to stick with my diet and exercise routine.

questionText: Um amigo está considerando uma cirurgia. Como você oferece apoio emocional apropriado?
correctAnswer: That must be a tough decision. I'm here for you no matter what you choose, and I'll support you through it.
options: That must be a tough decision. I'm here for you no matter what you choose, and I'll support you through it.

questionText: Como você pergunta ao farmacêutico sobre a interação entre dois medicamentos?
correctAnswer: Could there be any interaction between this medication and my blood pressure pills?
options: Could there be any interaction between this medication and my blood pressure pills?

questionText: Você precisa informar um restaurante sobre suas restrições dietéticas. Como você faz isso claramente?
correctAnswer: I have a severe gluten allergy, so I need to know which dishes are completely gluten-free.
options: I have a severe gluten allergy, so I need to know which dishes are completely gluten-free.

questionText: Como você expressa frustração com o sistema de saúde mantendo um tom respeitoso?
correctAnswer: I understand there are waiting lists, but I'm frustrated with how long it's taking to get an appointment.
options: I understand there are waiting lists, but I'm frustrated with how long it's taking to get an appointment.

questionText: Um colega compartilha que foi diagnosticado com diabetes. Como você responde com sensibilidade?
correctAnswer: Thank you for sharing that with me. If you need any support or someone to talk to, I'm here for you.
options: Thank you for sharing that with me. If you need any support or someone to talk to, I'm here for you.

questionText: Você quer perguntar sobre as opções de tratamento disponíveis para sua condição. Como você estrutura essa conversa?
correctAnswer: What are the different treatment options available? Could you explain the pros and cons of each?
options: What are the different treatment options available? Could you explain the pros and cons of each?

questionText: Como você comunica a necessidade de um cuidador ou assistência no dia a dia de forma clara?
correctAnswer: I'm having difficulty managing daily tasks on my own. I think I might benefit from some professional care assistance.
options: I'm having difficulty managing daily tasks on my own. I think I might benefit from some professional care assistance.

questionText: Você está discutindo com seu médico sobre ajustar sua dose de medicamento. Como você inicia essa conversa?
correctAnswer: I feel like my current dose isn't working as well as it did. Should we discuss adjusting it?
options: I feel like my current dose isn't working as well as it did. Should we discuss adjusting it?

questionText: Um familiar está em recuperação de uma cirurgia. Como você oferece ajuda prática de forma específica?
correctAnswer: I'd like to help with your recovery. Can I cook some meals for you or help with any household tasks?
options: I'd like to help with your recovery. Can I cook some meals for you or help with any household tasks?
Let me know if you need help

questionText: Como você educadamente questiona uma recomendação médica que não entende completamente?
correctAnswer: I appreciate the recommendation, but could you help me understand why you think this is the best approach?
options: I appreciate the recommendation, but could you help me understand why you think this is the best approach?

questionText: Você está enfrentando uma condição de saúde mental e quer confiar em um amigo. Como você aborda esse assunto delicado?
correctAnswer: I've been struggling with anxiety lately, and I thought it would help to talk to someone I trust. I really appreciate you listening.
options: I've been struggling with anxiety lately, and I thought it would help to talk to someone I trust. I really appreciate you listening.

questionText: Você precisa negociar um plano de tratamento que é financeiramente desafiador. Como você comunica suas preocupações?
correctAnswer: I understand this treatment is necessary, but I'm concerned about the cost. Are there more affordable alternatives or payment plans?
options: I understand this treatment is necessary, but I'm concerned about the cost. Are there more affordable alternatives or payment plans?

questionText: Um colega com deficiência pede acomodações no local de trabalho por razões de saúde. Como você demonstra compreensão?
correctAnswer: I completely understand your needs. Let's work together to find accommodations that help you work comfortably and productively.
options: I completely understand your needs. Let's work together to find accommodations that help you work comfortably and productively.
Just tell me what you need

questionText: Você deseja registrar uma reclamação formal sobre um atendimento inadequado de saúde. Como você estrutura isso apropriadamente?
correctAnswer: I'd like to file a formal complaint about my recent visit. The care I received fell below the standard I expected, and I'd like to discuss this with the appropriate department.
options: I'd like to file a formal complaint about my recent visit. The care I received fell below the standard I expected, and I'd like to discuss this with the appropriate department.

questionText: Um membro da família quer mudar de profissão por questões de saúde. Como você o apoia de forma construtiva na conversa?
correctAnswer: I understand why you're considering this change. Let's talk about what would make you happier and healthier in your work life.
options: I understand why you're considering this change. Let's talk about what would make you happier and healthier in your work life.
Do what you need to do

questionText: Você está discutindo estratégias de prevenção de doenças crônicas com seu médico. Como você engaja nessa conversa proativa?
correctAnswer: I want to be proactive about my health. What lifestyle changes or preventive measures would you recommend to reduce my risk of chronic diseases?
options: I want to be proactive about my health. What lifestyle changes or preventive measures would you recommend to reduce my risk of chronic diseases?

questionText: Um amigo está enfrentando vício em substâncias. Como você oferece apoio sem julgamento?
correctAnswer: I care about you very much. I know this is difficult, but I want to support you in getting the help you deserve. What can I do?
options: I care about you very much. I know this is difficult, but I want to support you in getting the help you deserve. What can I do?

questionText: Você precisa discutir opções de cuidados paliativos com a família. Como você facilita uma conversa tão sensível?
correctAnswer: This is a difficult topic, but I think we should discuss what kind of care Mom would want as her condition progresses. Her comfort and dignity are what matter most.
options: This is a difficult topic, but I think we should discuss what kind of care Mom would want as her condition progresses. Her comfort and dignity are what matter most.

questionText: Um colega está retornando ao trabalho após uma longa licença de saúde mental. Como você o reintegra de forma acolhedora?
correctAnswer: Welcome back! I'm glad to have you back with us. Don't hesitate to reach out if you need anything as you settle back in.
options: Welcome back! I'm glad to have you back with us. Don't hesitate to reach out if you need anything as you settle back in.

questionText: Você descobre que um colega está tendo dificuldades financeiras para pagar tratamento médico. Como você oferece ajuda de forma sensível?
correctAnswer: I've noticed you seem stressed about medical costs. Would it help if we organized a fundraiser or if I could help you explore other resources?
options: I've noticed you seem stressed about medical costs. Would it help if we organized a fundraiser or if I could help you explore other resources?

questionText: Você quer discutir a importância da saúde mental com seu adolescente. Como você inicia essa conversa de forma aberta?
correctAnswer: I know school can be stressful. I want you to know that mental health is just as important as physical health, and I'm always here to listen.
options: I know school can be stressful. I want you to know that mental health is just as important as physical health, and I'm always here to listen.

questionText: Um paciente idoso não está seguindo o regime de medicamentos recomendado. Como um cuidador aborda isso com sensibilidade?
correctAnswer: I've noticed you haven't been taking your medications as prescribed. Can we talk about what's making it difficult? Maybe we can find a way to make it easier for you.
options: I've noticed you haven't been taking your medications as prescribed. Can we talk about what's making it difficult? Maybe we can find a way to make it easier for you.

questionText: Você está navegando um diagnóstico terminal e precisa comunicar isso a amigos próximos. Como você o faz com dignidade?
correctAnswer: I've been given difficult news about my health, and I wanted to share this with people who matter to me. I'm still myself, and I hope we can continue our friendship as we have.
options: I've been given difficult news about my health, and I wanted to share this with people who matter to me. I'm still myself, and I hope we can continue our friendship as we have.

questionText: Um amigo está considerando um procedimento cosmético por razões de saúde emocional. Como você oferece uma perspectiva equilibrada?
correctAnswer: I understand this is important to you. Whatever you decide, I support you, but remember that your worth isn't determined by your appearance.
options: I understand this is important to you. Whatever you decide, I support you, but remember that your worth isn't determined by your appearance.

questionText: Você está fazendo um check-up anual e quer discutir fatores de risco genéticos. Como você estrutura essa conversa?
correctAnswer: I have a family history of heart disease. Should we discuss screening or preventive measures I could take given that genetic predisposition?
options: I have a family history of heart disease. Should we discuss screening or preventive measures I could take given that genetic predisposition?

questionText: Um colega está enfrentando infertilidade e compartilha isso com você. Como você responde com compaixão genuína?
correctAnswer: I can only imagine how challenging this must be. Thank you for trusting me with something so personal. Please know I'm here for you throughout this journey.
options: I can only imagine how challenging this must be. Thank you for trusting me with something so personal. Please know I'm here for you throughout this journey.

questionText: Você está discutindo opções de exercício adaptado com um fisioterapeuta devido a uma lesão. Como você colabora nessa discussão?
correctAnswer: I want to get back to exercising, but I'm worried about reinjuring myself. What activities would be safe and beneficial for my recovery?
options: I want to get back to exercising, but I'm worried about reinjuring myself. What activities would be safe and beneficial for my recovery?

questionText: Em uma clínica, como você pergunta se o médico está disponível para uma consulta hoje?
correctAnswer: Is the doctor available for a consultation today?
options: Is the doctor available for a consultation today?

questionText: Um amigo te pergunta como você está. Como você responde que está com um resfriado leve?
correctAnswer: I'm doing okay, but I've got a slight cold.
options: I'm doing okay, but I've got a slight cold.
